toast.source: Toast group Daily Performance Summary email ('The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Friday, June 19'), arrived Sat Jun 20 ~6:26 AM PT. Figures from the email body (All Locations = single location 229 W Montecito). Same-morning group email does NOT carry same-day-last-week / 4-wk comparison columns, labor $, void $, or discount $ -- those arrive with the detailed '229 West Montecito Street' summary ~1 day later.
toast.note: Toast Fri Jun 19 (group daily summary): Net $8,922.01 / Gross $9,081.95 / 322 guests / 189 orders / Labor 12.6% / 10 void items / discount 1.8%. Avg/guest $27.71, Avg/order $47.21. Card payments 168, 0 open orders, auto-clocked-out: None. Order type: 20 takeout ($140.25), 2 dine-in ($12.00), 0 delivery. laborCost ($1,124.17) and discounts ($163.48) are DERIVED from the percentages; void $, same-day-last-week & 4-wk comparison columns are not in the same-morning group email -- they land with the detailed 229 W Montecito summary ~tomorrow. [Sun Jun 21 4 AM: Saturday summary not yet arrived; SDLW added from Fri Jun 12 (Net $8,196.40 / Gross $8,489.00 -> Net +8.9%).]

yelpAds.note: Sat Jun 20 LIVE Chrome scrape of Yelp Ads dashboard. 30d: 48.2k ad impr (84% of 57.8k total), 561 ad clicks, 650 ad page visits (67% of 977), 146 ad leads (75% of 195). Billing period Jun 1-19: ad spend $367.93, Avg CPC $1.18, Avg CPL $4.49. 12mo leads: Ads 977 (57%)/Organic 735 (43%)/Total 1,712; forecast 73; 12mo page visits 8.3k. Bonus budget remaining NOT shown on the dashboard page this run. 12mo lead-type breakdown (Directions/Calls/Website/CTA) not shown this run -- carried.
